problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: The key to What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography is Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics — specifically Monte Carlo tree — which would help 4,000,000,000 people affected.
